data.name: Jaeger 1.26.4
data.body:
## What's Changed
* ci: add GitHub workflows for release automation by @Yasas1994 in https://github.com/Yasas1994/Jaeger/pull/25
* fix: rename jaeger test to jaeger health and add diagnostics by @Yasas1994 in https://github.com/Yasas1994/Jaeger/pull/26
* docs: add one-liner install script to documentation by @Yasas1994 in https://github.com/Yasas1994/Jaeger/pull/27
* chore(release): v1.26.3 hotfix by @Yasas1994 in https://github.com/Yasas1994/Jaeger/pull/28
* Fix documentation by @Yasas1994 in https://github.com/Yasas1994/Jaeger/pull/29
* fix: prevent GPU OOM during inference by @Yasas1994 in https://github.com/Yasas1994/Jaeger/pull/30
* feat: ONNX inference, INT8 quantization, and performance optimizations by @Yasas1994 in https://github.com/Yasas1994/Jaeger/pull/31
* feat: linear genome plots and prophage prediction in new pipeline by @Yasas1994 in https://github.com/Yasas1994/Jaeger/pull/32
* feat: major data/seq ops refactor + CLI smoke tests + deps by @Yasas1994 in https://github.com/Yasas1994/Jaeger/pull/33


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Yasas1994/Jaeger/compare/v1.26.1...v1.26.4
